SCRAPYARD_POWER_SCRAPYARD_ELECTRIC_POTEN: A target with a lower electric potential will take damage equal to the potential difference.
SCRAPYARD_POWER_SCRAPYARD_RENORMALIZE_PO: Your energy spend mode is changed to Subtract.
SCRAPYARD_POWER_SCRAPYARD_CHARGE_POWER.d: The next {Amount} attacks hit 1 additional time.
SCRAPYARD_POWER_SCRAPYARD_CHARGE_POWER.s: The next {Amount} attacks hit 1 additional time.
SCRAPYARD_POWER_SCRAPYARD_MONOTONE_FORM_: If card costs played this turn remain strictly increasing or strictly decreasing, playing a card multiplies your Energy by its cost.
If card costs played this turn remain strictly increasing or strictly decreasing, playing a card multiplies your Energy by its cost.
SCRAPYARD_POWER_SCRAPYARD_MUTUAL_INDUCTI: Electric Potential differences between enemies also deal damage.
Electric Potential differences between enemies also deal damage.
SCRAPYARD_POWER_SCRAPYARD_RARE_ENERGY_PO: If you have more than 1 Energy at end of turn, multiply your Energy by 35 next turn.
SCRAPYARD_POWER_SCRAPYARD_SOURCE_OF_FLAM: For this combat, double your maximum Energy.
